name: Pyramid
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The website is Britannica's educational article about the historical Pyramids of Giza in Egypt.
description_long: CRITICAL FINDING: The website listed for "Pyramid" (https://www.britannica.com/topic/Pyramids-of-Giza) is an encyclopedia article about ancient Egyptian monuments, not a consumer finance company. The content is exclusively historical and educational, covering the three pyramids built as royal tombs for pharaohs Khufu, Khafre, and Menkaure during Egypt's 4th Dynasty. There is no financial services business, no lending platform, no credit products, and no consumer finance operations described on this website. The URL appears to be either a data entry error, a test record, or a serious mistake in company research. No company named "Pyramid" operates from this domain. The categorization as "payday-alternatives" is completely invalid as there is zero evidence of any financial lending, credit union partnerships, employer advances, or alternative financial products. This profile cannot be completed as a legitimate consumer finance company profile because the source material contains no relevant business information whatsoever.
